negative_variants.description: Differential Common Mode Window Monitor: drives valid from the differential window only.
Differential Common Mode Window Monitor: drives valid from the common-mode window only.
Differential Common Mode Window Monitor: checks vip/vin individually instead of using differential and common-mode quantities.
Differential Common Mode Window Monitor: ignores the active-high enable input.
Differential Common Mode Window Monitor: uses unclipped or incorrectly scaled error metrics.
